channel.title: Improvisation on Mícheál Keating / Archive
channel.description: Recent content in Improvisation on Mícheál Keating / Archive

item.title: GROUNDWORK - Péist/O'Dea/Kemp
item.description: Sound Improvisation (vocals, guitar, fiddle, flute, signal processing) Multidisciplinary live performance with sound, video, and movement Building towards collapse only to build again, this performance brings together Limerick-based improvised noise group Péist, movement artist Aoibinn O’Dea and video artist Billy Kemp. GROUNDWORK unearths an interdependence between sound, movement and live-visuals, moving through fleeting moments of unity and discord. Taking their name from the Irish for ‘worm’, Péist’s improvisations use synthesisers, electro-acoustic instruments, and purpose-built software to wriggle and writhe between sounds and musical forms, burrowing through the dirt.

item.title: Péist - Three
item.description: Improviser (vocals, guitar and signal processing) Hear it on Bandcamp The third album by improvised music collective Péist “Péist (transl. worm) are a group of musicians and artists based in Limerick. In their improvisations, they wriggle and writhe between sounds and musical forms, burrowing through the dirt. Peíst are Mícheál Keating, Daithí Mac Cruitín, Eilis Mahon, Cian McGuirk, Caimin Walsh and Aoibhinn O’Dea”

item.title: Péist - Two
item.description: Improviser (vocals, guitar and signal processing) Hear it on Bandcamp The second album by improvised music collective Péist “Péist (transl. worm) are a group of musicians and artists based in Limerick. In their improvisations, they wriggle and writhe between sounds and musical forms, burrowing through the dirt. Peíst are Mícheál Keating, Daithí Mac Cruitín, Eilis Mahon, Cian McGuirk, Caimin Walsh and Aoibhinn O’Dea” Improviser (vocals, guitar and signal processing)

item.title: Péist - One
item.description: Improviser (vocals, guitar and signal processing) Hear it on Bandcamp The first album by improvised music collective Péist “Péist (transl. worm) are a group of musicians and artists based in Limerick. In their improvisations, they wriggle and writhe between sounds and musical forms, burrowing through the dirt. Peíst are Mícheál Keating, Daithí Mac Cruitín, Eilis Mahon, Cian McGuirk, Caimin Walsh and Aoibhinn O’Dea”
